channel.title: Blender on user859
channel.description: Recent content in Blender on user859

item.title: Learning Blender
item.description:
A simple laptop model in Blender, that for some reason took me 2 days to finish since i’m clearly new to this whole “3D Modelling” stuff. Not trying to be negative about it, though.

As i stated in my previous post, i didn’t planned to learn how to use this piece of program or 3D Modelling as a whole, but since i was curious on how to use this particular program, i decided to give it a try instead.
